items.title: Social Security accidentally declares Dallas woman dead four times since 2017
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Four convicted over spyware scandal that shook Greece
items.dek: In what became known as "Greece's Watergate", surveillance software called Predator was used to target 87 people.
items.body: In what became known as "Greece's Watergate", surveillance software called Predator was used to target 87 people.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Hillary Clinton to appear before US House panel investigating Epstein
items.dek: The former secretary of state recently dropped her longstanding refusal to appear, alongside her former president husband.
items.body: The former secretary of state recently dropped her longstanding refusal to appear, alongside her former president husband.
